mapper.sql: select id, channel_type, access_mode, name, bot_token, chat_id, enabled, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from monitor_alert_channel
mapper.select: where channel_type = 'telegram' and del_flag = '0' and create_by = #{createBy} order by enabled desc, update_time desc, create_time desc, id desc
where channel_type = 'telegram' and enabled = 1 and del_flag = '0' and create_by = #{createBy} order by update_time desc, create_time desc, id desc
select count(1) from monitor_alert_channel where channel_type = 'telegram' and del_flag = '0' and create_by = #{createBy}

select ac.app_id, c.id, c.channel_type, c.access_mode, c.name, c.bot_token, c.chat_id, c.enabled, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from monitor_alert_channel c inner join monitor_app_alert_channel ac on ac.channel_id = c.id where ac.app_id = #{appId} and c.channel_type = 'telegram' and c.del_flag = '0' order by c.enabled desc, c.update_time desc, c.create_time desc, c.id desc

select ac.app_id, c.id, c.channel_type, c.access_mode, c.name, c.bot_token, c.chat_id, c.enabled, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from monitor_alert_channel c inner join monitor_app_alert_channel ac on ac.channel_id = c.id where ac.app_id = #{appId} and c.channel_type = 'telegram' and c.enabled = 1 and c.del_flag = '0' order by c.update_time desc, c.create_time desc, c.id desc
where channel_type = 'telegram' and chat_id = #{chatId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into monitor_alert_channel( channel_type, access_mode, name, bot_token, chat_id, enabled, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{channelType}, #{accessMode}, #{name}, #{botToken}, #{chatId}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update monitor_alert_channel
access_mode = #{accessMode}, name = #{name}, bot_token = #{botToken}, chat_id = #{chatId}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and channel_type = 'telegram' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: update monitor_alert_channel set del_flag = '1', update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and channel_type = 'telegram' and del_flag = '0'
